metadata.description: tweak-design — local design-review playground for HTML layouts

plugins.name: tweak-design
plugins.description: Open a local design-review playground for any HTML layouts. Designers tweak CSS variables live in a sidebar, drop pin/quadrant annotations, compare up to 3 layouts side-by-side, click any element for a curated mini-editor, then export a structured markdown prompt that flows back into the next agent iteration.
